Name: Ticket Created - Notification & Triage Flow
Description: Triggered when a new Ticket row is added. Sends customer confirmation, alerts Teams on Critical, opens the SLA timer, and posts the initial comment.

Inputs.Subject: Ticket received: @{triggerOutputs()?['body/new_ticketnumber']}

IfYes.Name: Notify_Critical_Team
IfYes.Type: Teams - Post message in chat or channel

Inputs.Subject: Escalation alert - @{triggerOutputs()?['body/new_ticketnumber']}
Inputs.Body: Ticket has been escalated more than twice. Please review.
